chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.250 of 2024 Town Municipal Co. Ibrahim Hyderi Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection as at “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 1483/24 Dated: 03.02.2025 None present. -.-.- The office objection seems to be pending for quite some time and earlier on account of indulgence time was granted. Today neither counsel for the appellant is in attendance nor objections have been complied with. Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
